title: Chicken Paella with Japanese Twist
description: A fusion dish combining the flavors of Japanese cuisine with the traditional Spanish paella. This recipe features chicken and delicate rice cooked to perfection in a savory broth.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the pan and set aside.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside with the sausage.
Add the soy sauce, mirin, and sake to the pan, stirring to combine.
Add the rice to the pan and stir to coat with the liquid.
Add the chicken broth to the pan and bring to a boil.
Add the chicken and sausage back to the pan, stirring to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Garnish with green onions and serve hot.
